classes.name: Rogue
classes.description: Masters of stealth, deception, and precise strikes. Rogues specialize in finding vulnerabilities in their enemies and exploiting them with deadly efficiency.

hp_details.at_higher_levels: 1d8 (or 5) + your Constitution modifier per Rogue level after 1st

classes.starting_equipment:
• (a) fine clothes, (b) leather armor, or (c) 10 gc
• (a) ranged simple weapon and 20 munitions or (b) shortsword
• (a) 2 melee simple weapons or (b) thieve's tools
• (a) burglar's pack or (b) explorer's pack

subclasses.name: Swashbuckler
subclasses.description: Focuses on the art of the duel and elegance of motion. Your confidence in combat is your greatest weapon.

feat_rog_expertise.name: Expertise
feat_rog_expertise.description: Choose two of your skill proficiencies, or one skill proficiency and your Thieves' Tools. Your PB is doubled for any ability check you make that uses either of the chosen proficiencies.

feat_rog_expertise_6.name: Expertise (Level 6)
feat_rog_expertise_6.description: Choose two more of your proficiencies (skills or Thieves' Tools) to gain the Expertise benefit.

feat_rog_sneak_attack.name: Sneak Attack
feat_rog_sneak_attack.description:
• Once per turn, you can deal extra damage to one creature you hit with an attack if you have Advantage on the attack roll.
• You don't need Advantage if another enemy of the target is within 1.5m of it and you don't have Disadvantage.
• The attack must use a Finesse or Ranged weapon.

feat_rog_thieves_cant.name: Thieves' Cant
feat_rog_thieves_cant.description: You know a secret mix of dialect, jargon, and code that allows you to hide messages in seemingly normal conversation.

feat_rog_cunning_action.name: Cunning Action
feat_rog_cunning_action.description: You can take a Bonus Action on each of your turns in combat to take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

feat_rog_steady_aim.name: Steady Aim
feat_rog_steady_aim.description:
• As a Bonus Action, you give yourself Advantage on your next attack roll on the current turn.
• You can use this only if you haven't moved during this turn, and after you use it, your speed is 0 until the end of the turn.

feat_rog_asi.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_rog_asi.description: Increase one score by 2, or two by 1, or take a Feat.

feat_rog_uncanny_dodge.name: Uncanny Dodge
feat_rog_uncanny_dodge.description: When an attacker that you can see hits you with an attack, you can use your Reaction to halve the attack's damage against you.

feat_rog_evasion.name: Evasion
feat_rog_evasion.description: When you are subjected to an effect that allows you to make a Dexterity Saving Throw to take only half damage, you instead take no damage if you succeed, and only half damage if you fail.

feat_rog_reliable_talent.name: Reliable Talent
feat_rog_reliable_talent.description: Whenever you make an ability check that lets you add your PB, you can treat a d20 roll of 9 or lower as a 10.

feat_rog_blindsense.name: Blindsense
feat_rog_blindsense.description: If you are able to hear, you are aware of the location of any hidden or Invisible creature within 3 meters of you.

feat_rog_slippery_mind.name: Slippery Mind
feat_rog_slippery_mind.description: You gain proficiency in Wisdom Saving Throws.

feat_rog_elusive.name: Elusive
feat_rog_elusive.description: No attack roll has Advantage against you while you aren't Incapacitated.

feat_rog_stroke_luck.name: Stroke of Luck
feat_rog_stroke_luck.description:
• If your attack misses a target within range, you can turn the miss into a hit.
• Alternatively, if you fail an ability check, you can treat the d20 roll as a 20.
• Once used, you can't use it again until you finish a Short Rest or Long Rest.

feat_rog_archetype.name: Roguish Archetype
feat_rog_archetype.description: At 3rd level, you choose an archetype that you emulate in the exercise of your rogue abilities.

feat_swash_fancy_footwork.name: Fancy Footwork
feat_swash_fancy_footwork.description: If you make a melee attack against a creature, that creature can't make opportunity attacks against you for the rest of your turn.

feat_swash_rakish_audacity.name: Rakish Audacity
feat_swash_rakish_audacity.description:
• You can add your Charisma modifier to your Initiative rolls.
• You can use Sneak Attack if you are within 1.5m of the target, no other creatures are within 1.5m of you, and you don't have Disadvantage.

feat_swash_panache.name: Panache
feat_swash_panache.description: Your charm becomes extraordinarily beguiling. Use Persuasion vs Insight to charm a non-hostile creature or challenge a hostile one.

feat_swash_elegant_maneuver.name: Elegant Maneuver
feat_swash_elegant_maneuver.description: You can use a Bonus Action to gain Advantage on the next Acrobatics or Athletics check you make on your turn.

feat_swash_master_duelist.name: Master Duelist
feat_swash_master_duelist.description:
• If you miss with an attack roll, you can reroll it with Advantage.
• Once you use this feature, you must finish a Short Rest or Long Rest to use it again.
